tasks.label: Auto-start trading bot
args: if command -v tmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && tmux has-session -t trading_bot 2>/dev/null; then echo "Trading bot already running in tmux."; else PYTHON_BIN=/home/codespace/.python/current/bin/python bash ./run_tmux.sh; fi

tasks.label: Auto-start crypto bot
args: if command -v tmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && tmux has-session -t crypto_bot 2>/dev/null; then echo "Crypto bot already running in tmux."; else PYTHON_BIN=/home/codespace/.python/current/bin/python bash ./run_tmux.sh; fi

tasks.label: Auto-start API server
args: if command -v tmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && tmux has-session -t api_server 2>/dev/null; then echo "API server already running in tmux."; else tmux new-session -d -s api_server "cd /workspaces/Capitol_Trades_API && bash supervise_api.sh" && echo "API server started on port 8000."; fi

tasks.label: Auto-start mining dashboard
args: if command -v tmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && tmux has-session -t mining_dashboard 2>/dev/null; then echo "Mining dashboard already running in tmux."; else tmux new-session -d -s mining_dashboard "cd /workspaces/Capitol_Trades_API && bash supervise_dashboard.sh" && echo "Mining dashboard started on port 5051."; fi

tasks.label: Auto-start ASX bot
args: if command -v tmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && tmux has-session -t asx_bot 2>/dev/null; then echo "ASX bot already running in tmux."; else PYTHON_BIN=/home/codespace/.python/current/bin/python bash ./run_tmux.sh; fi

tasks.label: Auto-start forex bot
args: if command -v tmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && tmux has-session -t forex_bot 2>/dev/null; then echo "Forex bot already running in tmux."; else PYTHON_BIN=/home/codespace/.python/current/bin/python bash ./run_tmux.sh; fi
